topics: Write a Java program to print a string to the console
Write a Java program to find the average of three numbers entered by the user
Write a Java program to find the frequency of a given character in a string
Write a Java program to multiply two given matrices

Write a menu-driven Java program for vector operations: create a vector of 5 student names, insert an element at the third position, insert 3 elements at the end, delete an element from the second position, and delete all elements
Write a Java program to read a line of integers, display each integer, and the sum of all integers using StringTokenizer
Write a Java program to select a random element from an array of color names using the Random class
Write a Java program to display the calendar for a specified month and year, showing the correct days of the week for each date

Write a Java program to create a Student class with instance variables rollno and name, initialize two student objects using the insertRecord method, and display data using the displayInformation() method
Write a Java program to create a Student class with instance variables id and name, and initialize two student objects using a parameterized constructor
Write a Java program to calculate the area of circle, rectangle, and triangle using the concept of method overloading

Write a Java program with an Employee class having Name, Phone number, Address, and Salary as members and a printSalary() method, with Officer and Manager classes inheriting from Employee and having 'specialization' and 'department' as data members respectively
Write two Java classes Employee and Engineer where Engineer inherits from Employee, with display() and calcSalary() methods demonstrating single object instantiation
Write a Java program to demonstrate the usage of try, catch, throws, and finally
Write a Java program to demonstrate thread synchronization
Write a Java program implementing a multi-threaded application with two threads: one displaying "Java is simple" every 1 second and another displaying "Java is robust" every 2 seconds
Write a Java program for a simple calculator using Java Swing with buttons for digits and the + - * % operations, a text field to display the result, and exception handling for divide by zero

Write a Java program using Swing to create a frame with two text fields, two labels, and a button to calculate the factorial of a number entered in the first text field and display it in the second text field
Write a Java program to display all records from a table using Java Database Connectivity (JDBC)
